reasons: Public Content Envelope and delivery semantics

reproducibility.detail: Windows working-tree verification is available, but Linux and Windows clean-checkout evidence is not yet bound to an immutable commit.

static_correctness.detail: Web lint, TypeScript typecheck, standard and isolated production builds, and release-gate unit tests pass in the Windows working tree.

public_contracts.detail: Localized search, trusted identity resolution, language-aware canonical redirects, query preservation, unreviewed legacy 404 and versioned cached delivery behavior pass the complete browser smoke suite.
evidence: npm run smoke -w web: 28 passed on Windows Microsoft Edge

media_and_content_truth.detail: The new routes expose only TRUSTED_PANDA_DETAILS, label the versioned local release cached, distinguish complete and partial coverage, preserve fact status/precision/sources, render no-media states and do not expose generated legacy profiles.

browser_journeys.detail: The full 28-test browser suite passes against both the development server and an isolated production server on Windows Microsoft Edge, including bilingual, no-JavaScript, mobile and keyboard journeys; required fixed Playwright Chromium clean-checkout evidence on Linux and Windows is still missing.
evidence: npm run smoke -w web: 28 passed on Windows Microsoft Edge
npm run smoke:production -w web: 28 passed on Windows Microsoft Edge
19 localized trust-spine and trusted-profile tracer tests passed on Windows Microsoft Edge

automated_accessibility.detail: Dynamic axe WCAG A/AA scans, incomplete-result retention, keyboard behavior, 320x800 reflow, bilingual language declaration, 200-percent text resizing and reduced-motion assertions pass in Windows Microsoft Edge.
evidence: axe JSON attached for desktop, mobile and keyboard states
axe incomplete counts retained as test annotations

visual_regression.detail: Required deterministic Linux Chromium 390x844 and 1440x900 screenshot baselines and semantic visual review are not yet recorded.

performance_budgets.detail: The production build reports 103 kB shared First Load JS, 107 kB localized Home/Atlas and 108 kB trusted Profile, all within the Slice 1 limits.
evidence: shared First Load JS: 103 kB (budget 110 kB)
localized Home and Atlas: 107 kB (budgets 140 kB and 170 kB)

staging.detail: No immutable Staging deployment is currently bound to a commit, build checksum, API deployment and Public Release identity.

human_signoff.detail: Named bilingual, keyboard, zoom, visual, Edge plus Narrator and Firefox plus NVDA sign-off is not yet recorded.

release_decision.detail: Working-tree automation passes for the implemented slice, but Level 3 clean-checkout, immutable Staging, deterministic visual and named human evidence is incomplete. This manifest must not be interpreted as a release PASS.
